title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 27 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 27 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 27 2026
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 27/03/2026
The iron ore futures rose in early trading before gradually retreating during the day. The main contract I2605 ultimatelyclosed at 812 yuan/ton, down 0.49% from the previous trading session. Spot prices fell by about 5-7 yuan from the previous trading day.
